message:
refactor(trace): Pass VerificationOptions by reference for API consistency

Change verify_trace() and related functions to accept &VerificationOptions
instead of owned VerificationOptions:

- verify_trace(): Takes &VerificationOptions
- is_trace_valid_quick(): Updated internal call
- verify_header(), verify_metadata(): Pass reference through

This improves API ergonomics by:
1. Avoiding unnecessary clones when caller wants to reuse options
2. Making the non-consuming nature explicit at call sites
3. Aligning with Rust conventions for config/options parameters

Also includes minor improvements to trace file handling and recording.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
